Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 187 

SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_2_CD 

LABEL: Supplemental HRSN Substance Use 2: Past 12 Months Tobacco Use 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) Supplemental health related social need (HRSN) Substance use counting the past 
12 months tobacco use. 

LONG NAME: SR_SPLMTL_SBSTNC_USE_2_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Never 
1 = Once or twice 
2 = Monthly 
3
